package.json.general_idea: Update Node.js engine requirement to version 14.15.0 or higher to align with JDK 11 era tooling standards.
package.json.why_exists: Older Node.js versions (e.g., 0.12) are incompatible with modern build tools and dependencies required for the new JHipster version, causing installation or runtime failures.

package.json.general_idea: Replace Grunt-based build scripts with Angular CLI and Webpack-based scripts.
package.json.why_exists: Grunt is removed from dependencies; the old 'grunt test' command would fail because Grunt is no longer installed.

package.json.general_idea: Add Angular framework dependencies for the new frontend stack.
package.json.why_exists: The application has migrated to Angular 11; these packages are required for compilation and runtime.

package.json.general_idea: Add Angular CLI and build tooling dependencies.
package.json.why_exists: Required to run the new 'ng' based build and test commands defined in scripts.
The project has switched from Karma/Jasmine to Jest for unit testing; these are required for the new test runner.

package.json.general_idea: Add ESLint and Prettier dependencies for code quality.
package.json.why_exists: New linting scripts rely on these tools; without them, 'npm run lint' would fail.

package.json.general_idea: Add Webpack and related plugin dependencies.
package.json.why_exists: The build process now relies on Webpack 4; these are required for bundling assets.

package.json.general_idea: Add Protractor and Selenium dependencies for end-to-end testing.
package.json.why_exists: E2E tests now use Protractor; these are required for the 'e2e' scripts to function.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin to use annotationProcessorPaths for MapStruct and Hibernate JPA metamodel generation, replacing the deprecated maven-processor-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: The maven-processor-plugin is deprecated and incompatible with modern annotation processing standards; without this change, MapStruct and JPA static metamodel generation will fail or produce incorrect results in newer JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Liquibase plugin dependencies to use liquibase-hibernate5 instead of liquibase-hibernate4 to support JPA 2.1+ and Hibernate 5.
pom.xml.why_exists: liquibase-hibernate4 is incompatible with Hibernate 5 and JPA 2.1+ APIs used in Spring Boot 2.x; without this change, Liquibase diff generation will fail with classpath errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.validation validation-api dependency to Liquibase plugin dependencies to resolve missing API on classpath.
pom.xml.why_exists: Liquibase Hibernate 5 integration requires the Validation API; without this explicit dependency, the build may fail with NoClassDefFoundError for javax.validation classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jaxb-runtime dependency to annotation processor paths to resolve missing JAXB API in JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: JAXB was removed from the JDK module system in JDK 11; without this dependency, annotation processors relying on JAXB (like some Spring Boot config processors) will fail with NoClassDefFoundError.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Jib Maven plugin configuration to use adoptopenjdk:11-jre-hotspot as the base image.
pom.xml.why_exists: The previous configuration likely targeted JDK 8; without updating the base image, the container will not run on JDK 11.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy MySQL JDBC driver to HikariCP connection pool.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The com.mysql.jdbc.jdbc2.optional.MysqlDataSource class is deprecated/removed in newer MySQL Connector/J versions, causing ClassNotFound or runtime errors; HikariCP is the standard Spring Boot 2.x+ pool.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Hibernate dialect to support newer MySQL server versions and JDBC drivers.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQLInnoDBDialect is removed in Hibernate 5.2+, causing startup failure with 'Unknown dialect' error.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Replace deprecated Hibernate naming strategy with standard implicit naming strategy.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: org.hibernate.cfg.EJB3NamingStrategy is removed in Hibernate 5.2+, causing startup failure.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Ehcache region factory class to match Hibernate 5.x API.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: org.hibernate.cache.ehcache.SingletonEhCacheRegionFactory is removed/renamed in newer Hibernate/Ehcache integrations, causing startup failure.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate metrics configuration from Spring Boot 1.x 'metrics' namespace to Spring Boot 2.x 'management' namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The 'metrics' property prefix is removed in Spring Boot 2.x, causing configuration binding failures or ignored settings.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
management:
  metrics:
    export:
      prometheus:
        enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update database URL to include SSL and timezone parameters for MySQL 8 compatibility.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: MySQL 8 requires explicit SSL and timezone configuration to avoid warnings or connection failures.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate from Spring Boot 1.x legacy management endpoint configuration to Spring Boot 2.x hierarchical management configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed the `management.security.enabled` and `endpoints.*` properties; using them causes configuration binding errors or ignored settings.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
management.security.enabled: true
security.basic.enabled: false
endpoints.jolokia.enabled: false
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      base-path: /management
      exposure:
        include: ['configprops', 'env', 'health', 'info', 'jhimetrics', 'logfile', 'loggers', 'prometheus', 'threaddump']

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate from Spring Boot 1.x legacy async task executor configuration to Spring Boot 2.x `spring.task.execution` configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed the root-level `async` configuration key; using it results in unbound properties and default thread pool settings.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  task:
    execution:
      thread-name-prefix: jhipster-dto-sample-application-task-
      pool:
        core-size: 2
        max-size: 50
        queue-capacity: 10000

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate from Spring Boot 1.x legacy mail configuration to Spring Boot 2.x `spring.mail` configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed the root-level `mail` configuration key; using it results in unbound properties and default mail settings.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
mail:
    host: localhost
    port: 25
    username:
    password:
    protocol: smtp
    tls: false
    auth: false
    from: jhipster@localhost

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate from Spring Boot 1.x legacy Swagger configuration to Spring Boot 2.x compatible JHipster API docs configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changed how Swagger/Springfox integrates with the servlet path and security; legacy root-level `swagger` keys are no longer bound correctly.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
swagger:
    title: jhipster API
    description: jhipster applications and beyond!
    version: 0.0.1
    termsOfServiceUrl: http://jhipster.github.io/
    contact:
    license: Apache 2.0
    licenseUrl: http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.html
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
jhipster:
  api-docs:
    default-include-pattern: /api/.*
    title: jhipsterDtoSampleApplication API
    description: jhipsterDtoSampleApplication API documentation
    version: 0.0.1
    terms-of-service-url:
    contact-name:
    contact-url:
    contact-email:
    license: unlicensed
    license-url:
